title: RyDaCol's Star Wars Mod [NO LONGER UPDATING]
description: A mod aiming to bring the world of Star Wars into Minecraft in a Survival friendly manner
body:
[THIS MOD IS NOT UPDATING ANY LONGER. IT IS A COMPLETE BUGGY MESS AND I LOST INTEREST IN THIS ONE REALLY BAD. SORRY, GUYS :(]

This mod, aims to add aspects from the Star Wars movies to Minecraft in a balanced and Vanilla-ish manner.

It is recommended to use the optional dependency, MoreMcmeta Emissive Textures, for glowing Lightsaber textures.


**Why Should You Get This❓**

The mod is made for fans of the Star Wars franchise and will be expanded upon in the future, adding loads of Star Wars elements, ranging from structures to mobs and even planets. I tried making this mod unique by adding a space dimension, that you can get to, by flying above y1200 in the overworld. Some models also take inspiration from the Bedrock edition DLC: "Star Wars: Path of the Jedi", ensuring an even closer Vanilla feel.


**Contacting about any Bugs / Suggestions🔧**

Please contact me at https://discord.gg/E5G2QMrBvk about any suggestions or bugs that need fixing in the mod! The mod will not get ported by me, but maybe I'll allow somebody else to do it. The Star Wars franchise doesn't belong to me, after all. I'd also like you to keep in mind, that I use MCreator to make these mods and don't have a team.
**
Use in Video Content / Modpacks🎥** 

I would love for you to use this mod in Modpacks and Video content on platforms, such as Youtube, but please keep in mind that I do not own the Star Wars IP and if you use it in a video on Youtube.. PLEASE add "@RyDaCol" to the description, I would love to see your videos!!


**Consequences of Download / Potential Risk⚠️**

As this mod uses custom dimensions, you should get an experimental content warning, but it really shouldn't be an issue, and you should be able to proceed. The only problem, that you might encounter, is if you are you using multiple Star Wars mods and some item/mob/dimension/etc names clash, but otherwise the only issue you might encounter is when deleting the mod, as anything you built in other dimensions (added by this mod) would obviously be gone.


**What It (currently) Adds🧪**

**Mobs:**
- B1 Battle Droid (armed + unarmed)
- Tusken Raider (w/ Gaderffii)

**Items:**
- Lightsaber (Anakin Style)
- Lightsaber (KateyCol Style)
- Lightsaber (Vader Style)
- Lightsaber (Luke Style)
- Pocket Rocket
- Gaderffii
- Astro-Helmet

**Blocks:**
- B1 Battle Droid (redstone powered) (armed + unarmed)

**Dimensions:**
- Space
- Tatooine

**Commands:**

**Keybinds:**
- Force Push
- Lightsaber Ability <v>
- Force Jump
- Lightsaber (On/Off) <x>


This mod is a fan project and is in no way affiliated with or sponsored by George Lucas, Lucasfilm Ltd, Disney, or any of their affiliates. All Star Wars content is property of its respective owners
